"I dont know if anyone is having this problem but when i try to create this bot this first time and then try to update it. it wont like update, so i just deleted the bot and it wasnt being deleted, its still existing privately for me and when i try to delete it just gives me an error and now its just stuck there, i cant get rid of it, But the tokens i did save it to my notepad incase if i cant get it back this is my last bot of the day due to Janitor ai having alot of issues going on, if you make request it will be queued until tomorrow"
